text.en_4: You have a viral upper respiratory infection, also called a cold. We do not see signs of pneumonia today.
text.en_6: You have a viral upper respiratory infection, also called a cold. We did not find signs of pneumonia today.
text.en_hl1: You have a cold virus. We did not see pneumonia today.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Your breathing and oxygen level were safe for going home today.
text.en_6: Your breathing, oxygen level, and exam were reassuring enough for discharge today.
text.en_hl1: Your breathing and oxygen level looked safe today.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Drink fluids, rest, and use a humidifier or steam from a shower if it helps congestion.
text.en_6: Drink fluids, rest, and use a humidifier or steam from a shower if it helps your congestion or cough.
text.en_hl1: Drink fluids and rest. Steam or a humidifier may help.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Wash your hands often. Cover coughs. Stay away from people at high risk while you have fever or feel very sick.
text.en_6: Wash your hands often, cover coughs, and avoid close contact with high-risk people while you have fever or feel very sick.
text.en_hl1: Wash your hands. Cover coughs. Avoid high-risk people while you feel very sick.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Antibiotics do not treat cold viruses. They were not needed based on today's visit.
text.en_6: Antibiotics do not treat cold viruses. Based on today's visit, antibiotics were not needed.
text.en_hl1: Antibiotics do not treat cold viruses. You do not need them today.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: You can use acetaminophen or ibuprofen for fever or aches if these are safe for you. Read labels so you do not double up on the same medicine.
text.en_6: You can use acetaminophen or ibuprofen for fever or aches if these are safe for you. Read labels carefully so you do not take the same medicine twice.
text.en_hl1: Use fever medicine only if it is safe for you. Read labels. Do not double up.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Come back now for trouble breathing, chest pain, blue lips, confusion, fainting, or if you feel much worse.
text.en_6: Come back to the emergency department right away for trouble breathing, chest pain, blue lips, confusion, fainting, or feeling much worse.
text.en_hl1: Come back now for trouble breathing, chest pain, blue lips, confusion, fainting, or feeling much worse.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Come back if fever or cough gets better and then comes back worse, if fever stays high, or if you cannot drink enough fluids.
text.en_6: Come back if fever or cough improves and then returns worse, if fever stays high, or if you cannot drink enough fluids.
text.en_hl1: Come back if fever or cough gets better then worse, or if you cannot drink fluids.

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

text.en_4: Call your primary care doctor's office or clinic. Say, "I was in the emergency department and was diagnosed with a viral upper respiratory infection. I need a follow-up visit within 3-7 days if symptoms are not improving."
text.en_6: Call your primary care doctor's office or clinic. Say, "I was in the emergency department and was diagnosed with a viral upper respiratory infection. I need a follow-up visit within 3-7 days if symptoms are not improving."
text.en_hl1: Call your primary care doctor's office or clinic. Say, "I was in the emergency department and was diagnosed with a viral upper respiratory infection. I need a follow-up visit within 3-7 days if symptoms are not improving."

review.notes: Reviewed for viral_uri_no_pneumonia v1. Patient-facing text is locally authored from source-supported concepts.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.
